proxy.chain: Claude Code -> Headroom 127.0.0.1:8787 -> Docker DNS http://sub2api:8080 -> sub2api
proxy.windows_localhost_fallback: If Windows cannot reach 127.0.0.1:8787 but WSL/Docker can, publish Headroom on 0.0.0.0 and use http://<wsl-primary-ip>:8787. Do not use :18081 as the normal Claude Code endpoint.

headroom.accelerator: auto detects CUDA; cpu remains the portable fallback
headroom.effort_preservation: Preserve Claude Code output_config.effort on every tool continuation; do not rewrite max to low
headroom.rtk_execution: Install RTK in the OS that runs Claude Code Bash: Windows binary plus MSYS-safe WSL PreToolUse bridge, or one absolute native Linux PreToolUse hook
headroom.claude_code_handler_watchdog_action: cancel hung primary handler, retry once with Headroom bypass/passthrough headers, return 504 SSE only if bypass retry also times out
headroom.state_storage: host bind mounts only; do not use Docker named volumes for state

persistent_mounts./root/.headroom: Headroom ccr_store.db, savings events, logs, and subscription state

headroom.persistence_warning: Do not delete SUB2API_STATE_ROOT unless intentionally wiping Headroom memory/embeddings and all service state.
headroom.mcp_server: wsl.exe -e docker exec -i headroom-sub2api headroom mcp serve --proxy-url http://127.0.0.1:8787

sub2api.direct_port_use: admin UI, diagnostics, and non-Claude clients only

proxy.verified_main_commit: check git log -1 on stgmt/main after each pushed stack update

gpt-5.6-luna.note: Legacy fallback candidate for older Spark compact profiles; current small-fast/compact default is qwen3.8-max-preview high.

gpt-5.3-codex-spark.note: Official OpenAI launch notes describe Spark as text-only with a 128k context window and separate research-preview rate limits.

claude_code.context_target_kind: conservative Claude Code client compact/display target, not a proven model window
claude_code.raise_context_target_rule: Raise toward 1050000 only after a live long-context probe succeeds through this Docker proxy and this OpenAI/Codex OAuth account. Default to 370000/340000 until that proof exists.

diagnostics.legacy_gpt55_context_observation: Old gpt-5.5 setup failed with context_length_exceeded around 272k-278k estimated input tokens. Do not generalize this to GPT-5.6.
diagnostics.ghost_stream_sql_predicate: stream = true and input_tokens = 0 and output_tokens = 0 and duration_ms between 500 and 30000
diagnostics.account_cooldown_sql: select id, status, schedulable, concurrency, rate_limited_at, rate_limit_reset_at, temp_unschedulable_until, session_window_status, last_used_at, updated_at from accounts where platform='openai' order by id
diagnostics.recent_proxy_error_sql: select id, created_at, status_code, upstream_status_code, error_type, left(coalesce(error_message,''),140), left(coalesce(upstream_error_message,''),140), account_id, requested_model from ops_error_logs where created_at > now() - interval '4 hours' order by id desc limit 40
notes: Use clean gpt-5.6-sol for main GPT/Codex work and qwen3.8-max-preview high for Claude Code small-fast/compact/subagents. Legacy gpt-5.5[400k] is cosmetic only and must not be treated as the model window.

Expose only GPT/Codex and Alibaba Token Plan provider names in /v1/models. GPT/Codex routes to OpenAI/Codex OAuth; qwen*/glm*/deepseek-v4-pro routes to the Alibaba Token Plan Anthropic-compatible account. Claude Code Opus/Fable/Sonnet/Haiku picker slots are env aliases and should point to Qwen high (qwen3.8-max-preview).
Claude Code may still report maxOutputTokens as 32000 on custom/proxy models even when CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS=64000 is set.
On sub2api's Anthropic-to-OpenAI Responses route, thinking.budget_tokens is parsed but not forwarded as an OpenAI reasoning budget.

Codex/GPT-5.6 reasoning is requested with output_config.effort=max when the session or probe explicitly asks for max and should reach upstream as reasoning.effort=max. If structured logs show requested_effort=max plus upstream_effort=xhigh, the running image is stale or using a legacy fallback path.

Do not persist CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL in User/System env or settings.env. It overrides Claude Code /effort in every session. Keep effortLevel=xhigh as the startup default and use /effort or --effort for per-session max/high/xhigh experiments.
MAX_THINKING_TOKENS=8000 is a Claude Code compatibility guard, not the Codex reasoning control.
For a single-user local setup with multiple Claude Code windows, set accounts.concurrency=32; the default 3/12 can produce account_slot_acquire_failed under parallel subagent load.
If Claude Code reports 429 rate_limit_error or legacy 503 Service temporarily unavailable while /health is ok, check for openai_messages.account_select_failed with no available accounts.
Do not treat account cooldown 503 as a context-window, ghost-stream, or localhost routing failure.

OpenAI OAuth 403 auto-heal uses consecutive cooldowns 2s, 15s, 1m, then 5m. The first /v1/messages failure is retried once after 2.25s; a successful OpenAI usage resets the counter and clears only an OAuth 403 temp-unschedulable reason, never unrelated model or quota limits.

Use qwen3.8-max-preview as ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL and as the group compact_mapped_model for compact/small-fast routing. The current compact route rewrites GPT/Codex compact requests to Qwen before provider classification so the Alibaba Token Plan account handles them.

Use qwen3.8-max-preview with effort: high for the user-level Claude Code general-purpose, Explore, workflow-subagent, bench-reviewer, and bench-triage overrides so delegated agents do not inherit parent Sol/max. This is a model/effort override, not a global Agent-blocking hook.

Do not install PreToolUse/SubagentStart/SubagentStop state-file hooks to block Agent calls unless the user explicitly asks for a hard cap. Current fan-out control is advisory through workflowSizeGuideline=small and general-purpose.md guardrails. Do not claim a built-in depth cap prevents hundreds of spawned descendants; local sessions showed one parent line reaching hundreds of spawned agents.

Keep normal messages_dispatch_model_config.model_fallbacks empty unless the user explicitly asks for fallback behavior. Current Qwen-high compact routing uses group messages_dispatch_model_config.compact_mapped_model before provider classification; account compact_model_mapping and compact_model_fallbacks stay empty for this profile.

Fresh 2026-07-10 Luna re-probe returned HTTP 200 but usage_logs showed a fallback and ops_error_logs recorded recovered upstream 429. Treat Luna as unavailable until the mapping chain ends at gpt-5.6-luna.
Do not configure compact fallbacks by default for the Qwen-high profile. Keep failures visible unless the user explicitly asks for fallback behavior.
Manual /compact may ignore ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL in some Claude Code builds and use the session main model. Verify compact routing via usage_logs.requested_model/upstream_model.

If Headroom stalls inside the Anthropic handler before sub2api sees a request, the watchdog must not immediately return 504 to Claude Code. It should cancel the hung primary handler and retry once with x-headroom-bypass=true, x-headroom-mode=passthrough, and x-sub2api-headroom-watchdog-retry=1. Treat event=claude_code_handler_watchdog_retry_ok as the desired recovery proof; 504 event:error is only the final fallback after retry timeout.

Headroom embeddings/memory must be persisted through /root/.headroom as a host bind mount. Verify /root/.headroom/ccr_store.db after memory traffic, and keep /root/.cache/headroom plus /root/.cache/huggingface mounted so warmed tool/model/embedding caches survive container recreation.

All stateful services must use host bind mounts under SUB2API_STATE_ROOT, not Docker named volumes. Verify docker inspect mount Type=bind for headroom-sub2api, sub2api-codex, sub2api-codex-postgres, and sub2api-codex-redis.

Headroom image startup must go through /usr/local/bin/start-headroom-proxy so fresh persistent volumes are seeded from /opt/headroom-seed before headroom proxy starts. This prevents clean volumes from hiding bundled RTK/lean-ctx/difft/scc assets.

Compose must be fork-owned on both sides: Headroom builds from HEADROOM_GIT_REPO=https://github.com/stgmt/headroom.git at pinned HEADROOM_GIT_REF with HEADROOM_RUST_TOOLCHAIN=1.88.0, and sub2api labels record SUB2API_GIT_REPO=https://github.com/stgmt/sub2api.git plus the local SUB2API_GIT_REF.

If WSL/Docker GPU access is blocked, set HEADROOM_FORCE_KOMPRESS=0 and HEADROOM_DISABLE_KOMPRESS=1, pass both through compose, recreate Headroom, and verify /health reports kompress.status=disabled. Do not leave CPU ONNX Kompress on the Claude Code hot path.
